crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: PROTOCOL-DNS large number of NXDOMAIN replies - possible DNS cache poisoning
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert udp $EXTERNAL_NET 53 -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"PROTOCOL-DNS large number of NXDOMAIN replies - possible DNS cache poisoning"; flow:to_client,no_stream; byte_test:1,&,2,3; byte_test:1,&,1,3; byte_test:1,&,128,2; detection_filter:track by_src, count 1000, seconds 5; metadata:policy max-detect-ips drop; service:dns; reference:cve,2008-1447; reference:cve,2009-0233; reference:url,technet.microsoft.com/en-us/security/bulletin/MS09-008; reference:url,www.kb.cert.org/vuls/id/800113; classtype:misc-attack; sid:13948; rev:13; )

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET USER_AGENTS Suspicious User-Agent (Session) - Possible Trojan-Clicker
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET USER_AGENTS Suspicious User-Agent (Session) - Possible Trojan-Clicker"; flow:established,to_server; threshold: type limit, count 2, track by_src, seconds 300; http.user_agent; content:"Session"; depth:7; endswith; nocase; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2009512; rev:12; metadata:affected_product Any, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2010_07_30, deployment Perimeter, confidence Medium, signature_severity Major, tag User_Agent, updated_at 2020_09_14;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET MALWARE Possible Compromised Host AnubisNetworks Sinkhole Cookie Value Snkz
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE Possible Compromised Host AnubisNetworks Sinkhole Cookie Value Snkz"; flow:established,to_client; http.cookie; content:"snkz="; pcre:"/^\d{1,3}\x2E\d{1,3}\x2E\d{1,3}\x2E\d{1,3}/R"; threshold:type limit, count 1, seconds 300, track by_src; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2018141; rev:6; metadata:created_at 2014_02_15, confidence High, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2022_08_11, reviewed_at 2024_04_23;)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: New RUN Key Pointing to Suspicious Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects suspicious new RUN key element pointing to an executable in a suspicious folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Markus Neis, Sander Wiebing

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the suspicious RUN keys created by software located in Download or temporary Outlook/Internet Explorer directories

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Credential Manager Access By Uncommon Applications
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects suspicious processes based on name and location that access the windows credential manager and vault.
Which can be a sign of credential stealing. Example case would be usage of mimikatz "dpapi::cred" function
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Access To Windows DPAPI Master Keys By Uncommon Applications
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects file access requests to the the Windows Data Protection API Master keys by an uncommon application.
This can be a sign of credential stealing. Example case would be usage of mimikatz "dpapi::masterkey" function

Detects modification of the registry settings used for Internet Explorer and other Windows components that use these settings. An attacker can abuse this registry key to add a domain to the trusted sites Zone or insert javascript for persistence

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

crowdsourced_yara_results.author: Felix Bilstein - yara-signator at cocacoding dot com

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert udp $EXTERNAL_NET 53 -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"MALWARE-CNC DNS Fast Flux attempt"; flow:to_client; content:"|00 01|",depth 2,offset 4; byte_test:2,>,1,0,relative; byte_test:1,=,1,2,bitmask 0x80; content:"|00 01 00 01|",distance 6; content:"|00 01 00 01 00 00 00 05|",distance 0; metadata:policy max-detect-ips drop; service:dns; reference:url,attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1568/001/; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:57756; rev:2; )
